text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The split second before I cross the finish line
always feels like the most freeing moment in the
world! It's seriously the best!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Do you get the same feeling when you see me win
a race, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I get super hyped, for sure!

Let's make it so you can run even freer next
time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah?! I totes knew it! I'm so over the moon right
now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But y'know, the reason why I can let loose and run
as fast as I want is 'cause I've got an awesome
trainer backing me up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Anyway, let's keep up the great job!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Since we're hyped up to eleven anyway, we might
as well go somewhere and party it up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Whoa, you want me to run even freer than I am now? No cap? That's wild!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But I get the feeling I can actually do it! I'm gonna
keep one-upping my performance every time I
compete and leave everyone gagged with how
freely I run!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm super hyped now! Let's keep this
energy going!
